recommendations.title: Squared Love
recommendations.overview: A celebrity journalist and renowned womanizer starts to rethink his life choices after he falls for a mysterious model who leads a double life.

recommendations.title: Nappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: After an accident at the hair salon, Violet realizes she's not living life to the fullest. A soulful barber helps her put the pieces back together.

recommendations.title: The Sea Inside
recommendations.overview: Ramón Sampedro is a ship mechanic and part-time poet left a quadriplegic following a diving accident. Ramón fought for 30 years for the legal right to end his own life. He develops close relationships with his long-term lawyer Julia and his friend Ro

recommendations.title: The Call
recommendations.overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

recommendations.title: A Single Man

recommendations.title: Harold and Maude
recommendations.overview: A deadpan young man obsessed with death meets an eccentric septuagenarian who teaches him to live life to the fullest.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Book
recommendations.overview: The story of a young writer's transformation when her past invades her present.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 2

recommendations.title: Better Man

recommendations.title: The Promise
recommendations.overview: Set during the last days of the Ottoman Empire, a love triangle develops between Mikael, a brilliant medical student, the beautiful and sophisticated artist Ana, and Chris, a renowned American journalist based in Paris.
